dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.run_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(et.event_type_label,''),'(event)') AS event, e.event_date_key AS day, j.integration AS integration, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.out_namespace,''),NULLIF(e.in_namespace,''),'—') AS namespace, e.record_count AS records FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key LEFT JOIN dim_lineage_event_type et ON e.event_type_key=et.event_type_key WHERE j.job_name LIKE ${job} AND (e.failed_count>0 OR e.aborted_count>0) AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} ORDER BY e.event_date_key DESC, e.run_id

dataAccesses.name: RunCalendar
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day, SUM(e.event_count) AS events, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS fails FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key=d.date_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND e.event_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: FailureRateTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM') AS month, j.integration, ROUND(100.0*(SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count))/NULLIF(SUM(e.started_count),0),1) AS failure_rate FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key = j.lineage_job_key WHERE e.event_date_key <> 19000101 AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND j.integration <> 'Unknown' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

dataAccesses.name: Slowest
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT view_name AS job, ROUND(AVG(runtime_seconds)::numeric,1) AS avg_secs, SUM(run_count) AS runs, ROUND(100.0*SUM(success_count)/NULLIF(SUM(run_count),0),1) AS success_pct FROM fact_pipeline_run GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: Integrations
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All integrations' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT integration AS v, integration AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_lineage_job WHERE integration NOT IN ('Unknown') ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: Ranges
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 0 AS v, 'All time' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT to_char(current_date-365,'YYYYMMDD')::int, 'Last 12 months', 1 UNION ALL SELECT to_char(current_date-180,'YYYYMMDD')::int, 'Last 6 months', 2 UNION ALL SELECT to_char(current_date-90,'YYYYMMDD')::int, 'Last 90 days', 3 ORDER BY ord

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: WITH priv AS ( SELECT DISTINCT f.entity_key, COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, e.sensitivity FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens}) SELECT count(DISTINCT entity_key) AS priv_assets, count(DISTINCT term) AS terms, count(DISTINCT entity_key) FILTER (WHERE sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM')) AS elevated, count(DISTINCT entity_key) FILTER (WHERE sensitivity='HIGH') AS high FROM priv

dataAccesses.name: ByTerm
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: Scale
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.sensitivity AS s, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH') AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND e.sensitivity LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1

dataAccesses.name: BySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: HeatStacked
dataAccesses.sql: WITH tt AS ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS n FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 8) SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) IN (SELECT term FROM tt) AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2

dataAccesses.name: PrivTrend
dataAccesses.sql: WITH first_priv AS ( SELECT fp.entity_key, MIN(s.scanned_date_key) AS first_key FROM (SELECT DISTINCT f.entity_key FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens}) fp JOIN fact_entity_snapshot s ON fp.entity_key=s.entity_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY fp.entity_key) SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, d.year_month_number AS ym, COUNT(*) AS new_entities, SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY d.year_month_number) AS cum_entities FROM first_priv fp JOIN dim_date d ON fp.first_key=d.date_key GROUP BY d.year_month_name, d.year_month_number ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sources' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type AS v, datasource_type AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sensitivities' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT sensitivity AS v, sensitivity AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_entity WHERE sensitivity IS NOT NULL AND sensitivity<>'' ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.cardinality>0) AS profiled_cols, ROUND(avg(e.uniqueness) FILTER (WHERE e.uniqueness>0)::numeric,1) AS avg_uniq, ROUND(avg(e.selectivity) FILTER (WHERE e.selectivity>0)::numeric,1) AS avg_sel, max(e.cardinality) AS max_card FROM dim_entity e JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds}

dataAccesses.name: NullDist
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN e.null_count=0 THEN 'Complete (0%)' WHEN 100.0*e.null_count/e.row_count < 5 THEN '<5% null' WHEN 100.0*e.null_count/e.row_count < 20 THEN '5-20% null' WHEN 100.0*e.null_count/e.row_count < 50 THEN '20-50% null' ELSE '50%+ null' END AS band, count(*) AS cols FROM dim_entity e JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE e.row_count>0 AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: UniqDist
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN e.uniqueness>=99 THEN '99-100% (key-like)' WHEN e.uniqueness>=75 THEN '75-99%' WHEN e.uniqueness>=25 THEN '25-75%' WHEN e.uniqueness>=5 THEN '5-25%' ELSE '<5% (low)' END AS band, count(*) AS cols FROM dim_entity e JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE e.cardinality>0 AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(e.uniqueness)

dataAccesses.name: BySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, count(*) AS profiled_cols FROM dim_entity e JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE e.cardinality>0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: UniqBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(avg(e.uniqueness) FILTER (WHERE e.uniqueness>0)::numeric,1) AS avg_uniq FROM dim_entity e JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE e.cardinality>0 GROUP BY 1 HAVING avg(e.uniqueness) FILTER (WHERE e.uniqueness>0) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TopCols
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.entity_name AS col, COALESCE(NULLIF(d.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, e.cardinality AS card, ROUND(100.0*e.null_count/NULLIF(e.row_count,0),1) AS null_pct, ROUND(e.uniqueness::numeric,1) AS uniq FROM dim_entity e JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE e.cardinality>0 AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} ORDER BY e.cardinality DESC LIMIT 16

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sources' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type AS v, datasource_type AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: ProfilingTrend
dataAccesses.sql: WITH first_scan AS ( SELECT s.entity_key, MIN(dt.year_month_number) AS ym, MIN(dt.year_month_name) AS ymn FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date dt ON s.scanned_date_key=dt.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY s.entity_key ), monthly AS ( SELECT fs.ym, fs.ymn, COUNT(DISTINCT fs.entity_key) AS new_entities, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.cardinality > 0 THEN fs.entity_key END) AS new_profiled FROM first_scan fs JOIN dim_entity e ON fs.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY fs.ym, fs.ymn ) SELECT ymn AS month, new_entities, SUM(new_entities) OVER (ORDER BY ym) AS cum_entities, new_profiled, SUM(new_profiled) OVER (ORDER BY ym) AS cum_profiled FROM monthly ORDER BY ym

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_duplicate) AS dup_assets, ROUND(SUM(dup_savings_bytes)/1e12::numeric,1) AS savings_tb, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd*dup_savings_bytes/NULLIF(size_bytes,0))::numeric,0) AS savings_cost, ROUND(100.0*count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_duplicate)/NULLIF(count(*),0),1) AS dup_pct FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: SavingsBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(dup_savings_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(dup_savings_bytes)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: DupsBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_duplicate) AS dups FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 HAVING count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_duplicate)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SavingsBySens
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, ROUND(SUM(dup_savings_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND is_duplicate GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TopDups
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, st.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, ROUND(st.dup_savings_bytes/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM entity_storage_demo st JOIN dim_entity e ON st.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE st.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} AND st.is_duplicate ORDER BY st.dup_savings_bytes DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: DetailDups
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, st.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(st.size_bytes/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb, ROUND(st.dup_savings_bytes/1e9::numeric,2) AS savings_gb, COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(st.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM entity_storage_demo st JOIN dim_entity e ON st.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE st.is_duplicate AND st.datasource_type LIKE ${src} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY st.dup_savings_bytes DESC

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sources' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type AS v, datasource_type AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sensitivities' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS v, COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS l, 1 AS ord FROM entity_storage_demo ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.resource_type='Structured') AS structured_assets, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='TABLE') AS tables, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') AS columns, count(DISTINCT e.structured_schema) FILTER (WHERE e.structured_schema NOT IN ('','Unknown')) AS schemas FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE COALESCE(d.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.structured_schema,'') LIKE ${schema}

dataAccesses.name: ByType
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.entity_type AS etype, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE COALESCE(d.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.structured_schema,'') LIKE ${schema} AND e.entity_type IS NOT NULL AND e.entity_type<>'' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: DataTypes
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT upper(e.column_data_type) AS dt, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE COALESCE(d.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.structured_schema,'') LIKE ${schema} AND e.column_data_type IS NOT NULL AND e.column_data_type<>'' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: Keys
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 'Primary Key' AS k, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity WHERE is_primary_key UNION ALL SELECT 'Foreign Key', count(*) FROM dim_entity WHERE is_foreign_key UNION ALL SELECT 'Other Columns', count(*) FROM dim_entity WHERE entity_type='COLUMN' AND NOT COALESCE(is_primary_key,false) AND NOT COALESCE(is_foreign_key,false)

dataAccesses.name: SchemasByCols
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.structured_schema AS schema, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') AS cols FROM dim_entity e WHERE e.structured_schema NOT IN ('','Unknown') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: DSC
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.structured_table,''),'(no table)') AS tbl, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS col, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.column_data_type,''),'—') AS dtype, e.cardinality, e.row_count FROM dim_entity e WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN' AND e.structured_schema = ${schema} ORDER BY e.structured_table, e.entity_name

dataAccesses.name: TopSchemas
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.structured_schema AS schema, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') AS cols, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='TABLE') AS tables FROM dim_entity e WHERE e.structured_schema NOT IN ('','Unknown') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: SchemaGrowth
dataAccesses.sql: WITH monthly AS ( SELECT to_char(dt.full_date,'YYYY-MM') AS ym, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='TABLE') AS new_tables, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') AS new_cols FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date dt ON s.scanned_date_key=dt.date_key JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND e.entity_type IN ('TABLE','COLUMN') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.structured_schema,'') LIKE ${schema} GROUP BY 1 ) SELECT ym, SUM(new_tables) OVER (ORDER BY ym ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS total_tables, SUM(new_cols) OVER (ORDER BY ym ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS total_cols FROM monthly ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sources' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type AS v, datasource_type AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: Schemas
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All schemas' AS l, 0 AS ord, 0 AS cols UNION ALL SELECT e.structured_schema AS v, e.structured_schema AS l, 1 AS ord, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') AS cols FROM dim_entity e WHERE e.structured_schema NOT IN ('','Unknown') AND e.structured_schema IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY ord, cols DESC, l

dataAccesses.name: Headline
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(entity_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot) AS assets, (SELECT count(DISTINCT datasource_key) FROM fact_entity_snapshot) AS sources, (SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(entity_count),0),1) FROM fact_entity_snapshot) AS governed_pct, (SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) FROM fact_entity_snapshot) AS complete_pct, (SELECT count(DISTINCT entity_key) FROM dim_entity WHERE sensitivity='HIGH') AS high_sens, (SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(terminal_count),0),1) FROM fact_lineage_event) AS pipe_success, (SELECT ROUND(SUM(output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,0) FROM fact_lineage_event) AS gb_moved, (SELECT ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,1) FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE')) AS storage_tb, (SELECT ROUND(SUM((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0))::numeric,0) FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE')) AS monthly_cost, (SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(entity_count) FILTER (WHERE scan_freshness_band ILIKE '%stale%')/NULLIF(SUM(entity_count),0),1) FROM fact_entity_snapshot) AS stale_pct, (SELECT ROUND(100.0*count(DISTINCT f.glossary_term_key)/NULLIF((SELECT count(*) FROM dim_glossary_term),0),1) FROM fact_entity_term f) AS adoption_pct

dataAccesses.name: DomainHealth
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '1. Governed' AS metric, ROUND(100.0*SUM(governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(entity_count),0),1) AS pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot UNION ALL SELECT '2. Metadata Complete', ROUND(100.0*SUM(metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) FROM fact_entity_snapshot UNION ALL SELECT '3. Pipeline Success', ROUND(100.0*SUM(completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(terminal_count),0),1) FROM fact_lineage_event UNION ALL SELECT '4. Term Adoption', ROUND(100.0*count(DISTINCT f.glossary_term_key)/NULLIF((SELECT count(*) FROM dim_glossary_term),0),1) FROM fact_entity_term f ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: BySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(d.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SensMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Growth
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, ROUND(SUM(SUM(s.entity_count)) OVER (ORDER BY d.year_month_number)/1000.0,1) AS cum_k FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY d.year_month_name, d.year_month_number ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: Throughput
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM') AS month, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE e.event_date_key <> 19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT g.level_1_glossary) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM','LOW')) AS glossaries_w_sens, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity='HIGH') AS high_entities, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM')) AS hm_entities, ROUND(100.0*count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM','LOW'))/NULLIF(count(DISTINCT f.entity_key),0),1) AS sens_pct FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner}

dataAccesses.name: HeatStacked
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE NULLIF(g.level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 2,1

dataAccesses.name: RiskRank
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM')) AS hm_entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE NULLIF(g.level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner} GROUP BY 1 HAVING count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM')) > 0 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: DetailRiskDomain
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_name,''),'—') AS term, e.sensitivity AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM') AND COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner} ORDER BY 3, 1

dataAccesses.name: SensMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE NULLIF(g.level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TopTerms
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT g.term_name AS term, g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'?') AS sens, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM') AND COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner} GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY 4 DESC LIMIT 16

dataAccesses.name: Glossaries
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All domains' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT g.level_1_glossary AS v, g.level_1_glossary AS l, 1 AS ord FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE NULLIF(g.level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: Owners
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All owners' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS v, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS l, 1 AS ord FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM') ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,1) AS total_tb, count(*) AS assets, ROUND(AVG(s.bytes)/1e9::numeric,2) AS avg_gb, ROUND(MAX(s.bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS max_gb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: BySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: ByResType
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.resource_type,''),'(unknown)') AS rt, ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SizeDist
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT band, count(*) AS assets FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN s.bytes<1e9 THEN '1. <1 GB' WHEN s.bytes<1e10 THEN '2. 1-10 GB' WHEN s.bytes<1e11 THEN '3. 10-100 GB' WHEN s.bytes<1e12 THEN '4. 100GB-1TB' ELSE '5. 1 TB+' END AS band FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}) t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: GrowthCum
dataAccesses.sql: WITH first_scan AS ( SELECT s.entity_key, MIN(d.year_month_number) AS ym, MIN(d.year_month_name) AS ymn FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1) SELECT fs.ymn AS month, ROUND(SUM(SUM(s.bytes)) OVER (ORDER BY fs.ym)/1e12::numeric,2) AS cum_tb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key JOIN first_scan fs ON s.entity_key=fs.entity_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY fs.ym, fs.ymn ORDER BY fs.ym

dataAccesses.name: TopAssets
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.resource_type,''),'(unknown)') AS rt, ROUND(s.bytes/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY s.bytes DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: GrowthBySource
dataAccesses.sql: WITH top_src AS ( SELECT d.datasource_type AS src FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY SUM(s.bytes) DESC LIMIT 8 ), first_scan AS ( SELECT s.entity_key, d.datasource_type AS src, MIN(f.year_month_number) AS ym, MIN(f.year_month_name) AS ymn FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key JOIN dim_date f ON s.scanned_date_key=f.date_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1, 2 ) SELECT fs.ym, fs.ymn AS month, fs.src, ROUND(SUM(SUM(s.bytes)) OVER (PARTITION BY fs.src ORDER BY fs.ym)/1e12::numeric,2) AS cum_tb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key JOIN first_scan fs ON s.entity_key=fs.entity_key AND d.datasource_type=fs.src JOIN top_src ts ON fs.src=ts.src WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY fs.ym, fs.ymn, fs.src ORDER BY fs.ym, fs.src

dataAccesses.name: DetailAssets
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.resource_type,''),'(unknown)') AS restype, ROUND(s.bytes/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${src} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY s.bytes DESC

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sources' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type AS v, datasource_type AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sensitivities' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS v, COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_entity WHERE entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM dim_glossary_term g WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype}) AS defined, (SELECT count(DISTINCT NULLIF(level_1_glossary,'')) FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE COALESCE(level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype}) AS glossaries, (SELECT count(DISTINCT f.glossary_term_key) FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype}) AS in_use, (SELECT count(DISTINCT NULLIF(term_type,'')) FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE COALESCE(level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary}) AS types

dataAccesses.name: Adoption
dataAccesses.sql: WITH d AS (SELECT count(*) AS defined FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE COALESCE(level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype}), u AS (SELECT count(DISTINCT f.glossary_term_key) AS in_use FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype}) SELECT 'In use' AS status, (SELECT in_use FROM u) AS n UNION ALL SELECT 'Unused (orphan)' AS status, GREATEST((SELECT defined FROM d)-(SELECT in_use FROM u),0) AS n

dataAccesses.name: ByGlossary
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(*) AS terms FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE NULLIF(level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: TermTypes
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(term_type,''),'Unknown') AS term_type, count(*) AS n FROM dim_glossary_term GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Depth
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 'Level '||hierarchy_depth AS depth, count(*) AS n FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE hierarchy_depth IS NOT NULL GROUP BY hierarchy_depth ORDER BY hierarchy_depth

dataAccesses.name: Reach
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE NULLIF(g.level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: DGE
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_name,''),'—') AS term, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') = ${glossary} ORDER BY 3, 1

dataAccesses.name: TopTerms
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT g.term_name AS term, g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities, SUM(f.association_count) AS assigns FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 16

dataAccesses.name: Glossaries
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All glossaries' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT level_1_glossary AS v, level_1_glossary AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE NULLIF(level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: TermTypeOpts
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All types' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(term_type,''),'Unknown') AS v, COALESCE(NULLIF(term_type,''),'Unknown') AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_glossary_term ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: TermAdoptionTrend
dataAccesses.sql: WITH all_entities AS ( SELECT entity_key, MIN(scanned_date_key) AS first_key FROM fact_entity_snapshot WHERE scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY entity_key ), classified AS ( SELECT DISTINCT f.entity_key FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype} ) SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, d.year_month_number AS ym, SUM(COUNT(ae.entity_key)) OVER (ORDER BY d.year_month_number) AS cum_entities, SUM(COUNT(cl.entity_key)) OVER (ORDER BY d.year_month_number) AS cum_classified FROM all_entities ae JOIN dim_date d ON ae.first_key=d.date_key LEFT JOIN classified cl ON ae.entity_key=cl.entity_key GROUP BY d.year_month_name, d.year_month_number ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='FILE') AS files, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='FOLDER') AS folders, (SELECT count(DISTINCT extension_name) FROM fact_extension_daily) AS extensions, (SELECT SUM(file_count) FROM fact_extension_daily WHERE snapshot_date_key=(SELECT max(snapshot_date_key) FROM fact_extension_daily)) AS scanned_files FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds}

dataAccesses.name: ByExtension
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT extension_name AS ext, SUM(file_count) AS files FROM fact_extension_daily WHERE snapshot_date_key=(SELECT max(snapshot_date_key) FROM fact_extension_daily) GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(file_count)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: DFE
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type='FILE' AND lower(regexp_replace(e.entity_name,'^.*\.','')) = lower(${ext}) ORDER BY e.entity_name LIMIT 500

dataAccesses.name: BySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, count(*) AS files FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type='FILE' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Trend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT dd.year_month_name AS month, SUM(f.file_count) AS files FROM fact_extension_daily f JOIN dim_date dd ON f.snapshot_date_key=dd.date_key WHERE f.snapshot_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY dd.year_month_name, dd.year_month_number ORDER BY dd.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sources' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type AS v, datasource_type AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(*) AS cols, count(*) FILTER (WHERE row_count>10 AND cardinality>=row_count*0.99) AS key_candidates, count(*) FILTER (WHERE cardinality=1) AS dead_cols, count(*) FILTER (WHERE row_count>0 AND null_count>0) AS has_nulls FROM dim_entity WHERE NULLIF(column_data_type,'') IS NOT NULL AND column_data_type LIKE ${dtype} AND split_part(regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/([^/]+/[^/]+)/[^/]*$','\1'),'/',1) LIKE ${schema}

dataAccesses.name: HealthMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN cardinality=1 THEN '4. Constant (dead)' WHEN row_count>10 AND cardinality>=row_count*0.99 THEN '1. Unique (key candidate)' WHEN cardinality::numeric/NULLIF(row_count,0)>=0.5 THEN '2. High cardinality' ELSE '3. Low / normal' END AS bucket, count(*) AS cols FROM dim_entity WHERE NULLIF(column_data_type,'') IS NOT NULL AND column_data_type LIKE ${dtype} AND split_part(regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/([^/]+/[^/]+)/[^/]*$','\1'),'/',1) LIKE ${schema} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: ByType
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT column_data_type AS dtype, count(*) AS cols FROM dim_entity WHERE NULLIF(column_data_type,'') IS NOT NULL AND split_part(regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/([^/]+/[^/]+)/[^/]*$','\1'),'/',1) LIKE ${schema} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: DeadByTable
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/([^/]+/[^/]+)/[^/]*$','\1') AS tbl, count(*) AS dead FROM dim_entity WHERE NULLIF(column_data_type,'') IS NOT NULL AND cardinality=1 AND column_data_type LIKE ${dtype} AND split_part(regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/([^/]+/[^/]+)/[^/]*$','\1'),'/',1) LIKE ${schema} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: DetailDeadByTable
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/','') AS col, column_data_type AS dtype, row_count FROM dim_entity WHERE NULLIF(column_data_type,'') IS NOT NULL AND cardinality=1 AND column_data_type LIKE ${dtype} AND regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/([^/]+/[^/]+)/[^/]*$','\1') LIKE ${tbl} ORDER BY row_count DESC

dataAccesses.name: KeyCandidates
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/','') AS col, regexp_replace(structured_column,'/[^/]*$','') AS path, column_data_type AS dtype, cardinality, row_count FROM dim_entity WHERE NULLIF(column_data_type,'') IS NOT NULL AND row_count>10 AND cardinality>=row_count*0.99 AND column_data_type LIKE ${dtype} AND split_part(regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/([^/]+/[^/]+)/[^/]*$','\1'),'/',1) LIKE ${schema} ORDER BY row_count DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: DeadCols
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/','') AS col, regexp_replace(structured_column,'/[^/]*$','') AS path, column_data_type AS dtype, row_count FROM dim_entity WHERE NULLIF(column_data_type,'') IS NOT NULL AND cardinality=1 AND column_data_type LIKE ${dtype} AND split_part(regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/([^/]+/[^/]+)/[^/]*$','\1'),'/',1) LIKE ${schema} ORDER BY row_count DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: HealthByType
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT upper(column_data_type) AS dtype, CASE WHEN cardinality=1 THEN '4-Dead' WHEN row_count>10 AND cardinality>=row_count*0.99 THEN '1-Key' WHEN cardinality::numeric/NULLIF(row_count,0)>=0.5 THEN '2-High' ELSE '3-Low' END AS bucket, count(*) AS cols FROM dim_entity WHERE NULLIF(column_data_type,'') IS NOT NULL AND column_data_type LIKE ${dtype} AND split_part(regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/([^/]+/[^/]+)/[^/]*$','\1'),'/',1) LIKE ${schema} GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

dataAccesses.name: DataTypes
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT column_data_type FROM dim_entity WHERE NULLIF(column_data_type,'') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Schemas
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/([^/]+/[^/]+)/[^/]*$','\1'),'/',1) AS schema FROM dim_entity WHERE NULLIF(column_data_type,'') IS NOT NULL AND NULLIF(structured_column,'') IS NOT NULL AND split_part(regexp_replace(structured_column,'^.*/([^/]+/[^/]+)/[^/]*$','\1'),'/',1) <> '' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, count(DISTINCT split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1)||'>'||split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1)) AS flows, count(DISTINCT split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1)) AS src_platforms, count(DISTINCT split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1)) AS dst_platforms, SUM(c.connection_count) AS conns FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE c.orig_namespace<>c.dest_namespace AND c.bytes_moved>0 AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND (${platform}='%' OR split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1) LIKE ${platform} OR split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) LIKE ${platform})

dataAccesses.name: Flows
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1) AS src, split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) AS dst, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, SUM(c.connection_count) AS conns FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE c.orig_namespace<>c.dest_namespace AND c.bytes_moved>0 AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND (${platform}='%' OR split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1) LIKE ${platform} OR split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) LIKE ${platform}) GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING SUM(c.bytes_moved)>0 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 24

dataAccesses.name: DetailPlatformFlows
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (COALESCE(NULLIF(c.orig_name,''),'(unnamed)') || ' → ' || COALESCE(NULLIF(c.dest_name,''),'(unnamed)')) AS flow, split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1) || ' → ' || split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) AS route, j.integration AS integ, SUM(c.record_count) AS records, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE c.orig_namespace<>c.dest_namespace AND c.bytes_moved>0 AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND (split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1) = ${platform} OR split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) = ${platform}) GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY gb DESC

dataAccesses.name: BySrc
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1) AS src, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE c.orig_namespace<>c.dest_namespace AND c.bytes_moved>0 AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND (${platform}='%' OR split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1) LIKE ${platform} OR split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) LIKE ${platform}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: ByIntegration
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration AS integ, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE c.bytes_moved>0 AND j.integration<>'Unknown' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TopFlows
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT c.orig_namespace||' → '||c.dest_namespace AS flow, j.integration AS integ, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, SUM(c.connection_count) AS conns FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE c.orig_namespace<>c.dest_namespace AND c.bytes_moved>0 AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND (${platform}='%' OR split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1) LIKE ${platform} OR split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) LIKE ${platform}) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 16

dataAccesses.name: I
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT integration FROM dim_lineage_job WHERE integration NOT IN ('Unknown') ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Platforms
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(orig_namespace,'://',1) AS platform FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE bytes_moved>0 AND split_part(orig_namespace,'://',1)<>'' UNION SELECT DISTINCT split_part(dest_namespace,'://',1) FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE bytes_moved>0 AND split_part(dest_namespace,'://',1)<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: MovementTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM') AS ym, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key=d.date_key JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND j.integration<>'Unknown' AND e.event_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM'), date_trunc('month',d.full_date) ORDER BY date_trunc('month',d.full_date)

dataAccesses.name: K
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (SELECT count(DISTINCT integration) FROM dim_lineage_job WHERE integration<>'Unknown') AS integrations, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, (SELECT SUM(restricted_to_ungoverned_count) FROM fact_lineage_connection) AS restricted_ungov FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND j.integration<>'Unknown'

dataAccesses.name: BI

dataAccesses.name: DIF
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (COALESCE(NULLIF(c.orig_name,''),'(unnamed)') || ' → ' || COALESCE(NULLIF(c.dest_name,''),'(unnamed)')) AS flow, split_part(c.orig_namespace,'://',1) || ' → ' || split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) AS route, SUM(c.record_count) AS records, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE c.orig_namespace<>c.dest_namespace AND c.bytes_moved>0 AND j.integration = ${integration} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY gb DESC

dataAccesses.name: PM
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT split_part(orig_namespace,'://',1) AS src_platform, split_part(dest_namespace,'://',1) AS dest_platform, ROUND(SUM(bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE orig_namespace<>dest_namespace GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING SUM(bytes_moved)>0 ORDER BY 3 DESC

dataAccesses.name: IPF
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration AS integ, split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) AS dest_platform, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, SUM(c.connection_count) AS conns FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE c.bytes_moved>0 AND j.integration<>'Unknown' AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) LIKE ${platform} GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING SUM(c.bytes_moved)>0 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 24

dataAccesses.name: T
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM') AS month, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key <> 19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: S
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration AS integ, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration<>'Unknown' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TF
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration AS integ, c.orig_namespace||' → '||c.dest_namespace AS flow, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, SUM(c.connection_count) AS conns FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND split_part(c.dest_namespace,'://',1) LIKE ${platform} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 20

dataAccesses.name: IntCalendar
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS fails FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key=d.date_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND j.integration<>'Unknown' AND e.event_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY d.full_date ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: I
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT integration FROM dim_lineage_job WHERE integration NOT IN ('Unknown') ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: DestPlatforms
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(dest_namespace,'://',1) AS platform FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE bytes_moved>0 AND split_part(dest_namespace,'://',1)<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Headline
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(entity_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot) AS assets, (SELECT count(DISTINCT datasource_key) FROM fact_entity_snapshot) AS sources, (SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(entity_count),0),1) FROM fact_entity_snapshot) AS governed_pct, (SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) FROM fact_entity_snapshot) AS complete_pct, (SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(entity_count) FILTER (WHERE scan_freshness_band ILIKE '%stale%')/NULLIF(SUM(entity_count),0),1) FROM fact_entity_snapshot) AS stale_pct, (SELECT count(DISTINCT entity_key) FROM dim_entity WHERE sensitivity='HIGH') AS high_sens, (SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(terminal_count),0),1) FROM fact_lineage_event) AS pipe_success, (SELECT SUM(started_count) FROM fact_lineage_event) AS runs, (SELECT ROUND(SUM(output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,0) FROM fact_lineage_event) AS gb_moved, (SELECT count(DISTINCT integration) FROM dim_lineage_job WHERE integration<>'Unknown') AS integrations, (SELECT count(*) FROM dim_glossary_term) AS terms, (SELECT ROUND(100.0*count(DISTINCT f.glossary_term_key)/NULLIF((SELECT count(*) FROM dim_glossary_term),0),1) FROM fact_entity_term f) AS adoption_pct, (SELECT count(*) FROM dim_policy) AS policies, (SELECT ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,1) FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE')) AS storage_tb, (SELECT ROUND(SUM((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0))::numeric,0) FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE')) AS monthly_cost, (SELECT count(*) FROM dim_entity WHERE NULLIF(column_data_type,'') IS NOT NULL AND cardinality=1) AS dead_cols

dataAccesses.name: Growth
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY d.year_month_name, d.year_month_number ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: Throughput
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM') AS month, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE e.event_date_key <> 19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: K
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(entity_count) AS total_assets, count(DISTINCT scanned_date_key) FILTER (WHERE scanned_date_key<>19000101) AS scan_days, count(DISTINCT datasource_key) AS sources, SUM(entity_count) FILTER (WHERE scanned_date_key >= to_char(current_date-90,'YYYYMMDD')::int) AS last90 FROM fact_entity_snapshot

dataAccesses.name: T
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, d.year_month_number AS ym, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets, SUM(SUM(s.entity_count)) OVER (ORDER BY d.year_month_number) AS cumulative FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 2

dataAccesses.name: BS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource dd ON s.datasource_key=dd.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: R
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.entity_name AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, d.full_date AS scan_date FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON s.datasource_key=dd.datasource_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 ORDER BY s.scanned_date_key DESC LIMIT 18

dataAccesses.name: GBS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, d.year_month_number AS ym, COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON s.datasource_key=dd.datasource_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY 2,3

dataAccesses.name: K
dataAccesses.sql: WITH priv AS (SELECT DISTINCT f.entity_key, COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) term FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens}) SELECT count(DISTINCT entity_key) AS priv_assets, count(DISTINCT term) AS terms, (SELECT count(DISTINCT e2.entity_key) FROM dim_entity e2 LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd2 ON md5(e2.datasource_nk)=dd2.datasource_key WHERE e2.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM') AND COALESCE(dd2.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e2.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens}) AS elevated, (SELECT count(DISTINCT e3.entity_key) FROM dim_entity e3 LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd3 ON md5(e3.datasource_nk)=dd3.datasource_key WHERE e3.sensitivity='HIGH' AND COALESCE(dd3.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e3.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens}) AS high FROM priv

dataAccesses.name: BT
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: BS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SC
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.sensitivity AS s, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH') AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND e.sensitivity LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1

dataAccesses.name: MX
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC

dataAccesses.name: PT
dataAccesses.sql: WITH first_priv AS ( SELECT fp.entity_key, MIN(s.scanned_date_key) AS first_key FROM (SELECT DISTINCT f.entity_key FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'') LIKE ${sens}) fp JOIN fact_entity_snapshot s ON fp.entity_key=s.entity_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY fp.entity_key) SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, d.year_month_number AS ym, COUNT(*) AS new_entities, SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY d.year_month_number) AS cum_entities FROM first_priv fp JOIN dim_date d ON fp.first_key=d.date_key GROUP BY d.year_month_name, d.year_month_number ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: DS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: SNS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT sensitivity FROM dim_entity WHERE sensitivity IS NOT NULL AND sensitivity<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: K
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE cardinality>0) AS profiled_cols, round(avg(uniqueness) FILTER (WHERE uniqueness>0)::numeric,1) AS avg_uniq, round(avg(selectivity) FILTER (WHERE selectivity>0)::numeric,1) AS avg_sel, max(cardinality) AS max_card FROM dim_entity

dataAccesses.name: ND
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN null_count=0 THEN '1. Complete (0%)' WHEN 100.0*null_count/row_count < 5 THEN '2. <5% null' WHEN 100.0*null_count/row_count < 20 THEN '3. 5-20% null' WHEN 100.0*null_count/row_count < 50 THEN '4. 20-50% null' ELSE '5. 50%+ null' END AS band, count(*) AS cols FROM dim_entity WHERE row_count>0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: BS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, count(*) AS profiled_cols, round(avg(e.uniqueness) FILTER (WHERE e.uniqueness>0)::numeric,1) AS avg_uniq FROM dim_entity e JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE e.cardinality>0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SC
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT entity_name AS col, row_count AS rows, cardinality AS card, round(uniqueness::numeric,1) AS uniq FROM dim_entity WHERE cardinality>0 AND row_count>0 ORDER BY cardinality DESC LIMIT 60

dataAccesses.name: TC
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT entity_name AS col, row_count AS rows, cardinality AS card, round(100.0*null_count/NULLIF(row_count,0),1) AS null_pct, round(uniqueness::numeric,1) AS uniq FROM dim_entity WHERE cardinality>0 ORDER BY cardinality DESC LIMIT 18

dataAccesses.name: ProfilingTrend
dataAccesses.sql: WITH first_scan AS ( SELECT s.entity_key, MIN(dt.year_month_number) AS ym, MIN(dt.year_month_name) AS ymn FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date dt ON s.scanned_date_key=dt.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY s.entity_key ), monthly AS ( SELECT fs.ym, fs.ymn, COUNT(DISTINCT fs.entity_key) AS new_entities, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.cardinality > 0 THEN fs.entity_key END) AS new_profiled FROM first_scan fs JOIN dim_entity e ON fs.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY fs.ym, fs.ymn ) SELECT ymn AS month, new_entities, SUM(new_entities) OVER (ORDER BY ym) AS cum_entities, new_profiled, SUM(new_profiled) OVER (ORDER BY ym) AS cum_profiled FROM monthly ORDER BY ym

dataAccesses.name: K
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.resource_type='Structured') AS structured_assets, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='TABLE') AS tables, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') AS columns, count(DISTINCT e.structured_schema) FILTER (WHERE e.structured_schema NOT IN ('','Unknown')) AS schemas FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE COALESCE(d.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.structured_schema,'') LIKE ${schema}

dataAccesses.name: BT
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.entity_type AS etype, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE COALESCE(d.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.structured_schema,'') LIKE ${schema} AND e.entity_type IS NOT NULL AND e.entity_type<>'' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: DT
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT upper(e.column_data_type) AS dt, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE COALESCE(d.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.structured_schema,'') LIKE ${schema} AND e.column_data_type IS NOT NULL AND e.column_data_type<>'' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: TS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.structured_schema AS schema, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') AS cols, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='TABLE') AS tables FROM dim_entity e WHERE e.structured_schema NOT IN ('','Unknown') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: DSC
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.structured_table,''),'(no table)') AS tbl, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS col, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.column_data_type,''),'—') AS dtype, e.cardinality, e.row_count FROM dim_entity e WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN' AND e.structured_schema = ${schema} ORDER BY e.structured_table, e.entity_name

dataAccesses.name: KY
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 'Primary Key' AS k, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity WHERE is_primary_key UNION ALL SELECT 'Foreign Key', count(*) FROM dim_entity WHERE is_foreign_key UNION ALL SELECT 'Other Columns', count(*) FROM dim_entity WHERE entity_type='COLUMN' AND NOT COALESCE(is_primary_key,false) AND NOT COALESCE(is_foreign_key,false)

dataAccesses.name: SchemaGrowth
dataAccesses.sql: WITH monthly AS ( SELECT to_char(dt.full_date,'YYYY-MM') AS ym, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='TABLE') AS new_tables, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') AS new_cols FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date dt ON s.scanned_date_key=dt.date_key JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND e.entity_type IN ('TABLE','COLUMN') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.structured_schema,'') LIKE ${schema} GROUP BY 1 ) SELECT ym, SUM(new_tables) OVER (ORDER BY ym ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS total_tables, SUM(new_cols) OVER (ORDER BY ym ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS total_cols FROM monthly ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: DS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: SC
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.structured_schema AS schema FROM dim_entity e WHERE e.structured_schema NOT IN ('','Unknown') AND e.structured_schema IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') DESC LIMIT 40

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT g.level_1_glossary) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM','LOW')) AS glossaries_w_sens, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity='HIGH') AS high_entities, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM')) AS hm_entities, ROUND(100.0*count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM','LOW'))/NULLIF(count(DISTINCT f.entity_key),0),1) AS sens_pct FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner}

dataAccesses.name: Heat
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE NULLIF(g.level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: RiskRank
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM')) AS hm_entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE NULLIF(g.level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner} GROUP BY 1 HAVING count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) FILTER (WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM')) > 0 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: DetailRiskDomain
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_name,''),'—') AS term, e.sensitivity AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM') AND COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner} ORDER BY 3, 1

dataAccesses.name: SensMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE NULLIF(g.level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TopTerms
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT g.term_name AS term, g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'?') AS sens, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM') AND COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') LIKE ${owner} GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY 4 DESC LIMIT 16

dataAccesses.name: Glossaries
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT g.level_1_glossary FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE NULLIF(g.level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Owners
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM') ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM dim_glossary_term g WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype}) AS defined, (SELECT count(DISTINCT NULLIF(level_1_glossary,'')) FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE COALESCE(level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype}) AS glossaries, (SELECT count(DISTINCT f.glossary_term_key) FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype}) AS in_use, (SELECT count(DISTINCT NULLIF(term_type,'')) FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE COALESCE(level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary}) AS types

dataAccesses.name: Adoption
dataAccesses.sql: WITH d AS (SELECT count(*) AS defined FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE COALESCE(level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype}), u AS (SELECT count(DISTINCT f.glossary_term_key) AS in_use FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype}) SELECT 'In use' AS status, (SELECT in_use FROM u) AS n UNION ALL SELECT 'Unused (orphan)' AS status, GREATEST((SELECT defined FROM d)-(SELECT in_use FROM u),0) AS n

dataAccesses.name: ByGlossary
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(*) AS terms FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE NULLIF(level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TermTypes
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(term_type,''),'Unknown') AS term_type, count(*) AS n FROM dim_glossary_term GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Depth
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 'Level '||hierarchy_depth AS depth, count(*) AS n FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE hierarchy_depth IS NOT NULL GROUP BY hierarchy_depth ORDER BY hierarchy_depth

dataAccesses.name: Reach
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE NULLIF(g.level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: DGE
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_name,''),'—') AS term, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') = ${glossary} ORDER BY 3, 1

dataAccesses.name: TopTerms
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT g.term_name AS term, g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities, SUM(f.association_count) AS assigns FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 16

dataAccesses.name: Glossaries
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT level_1_glossary FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE NULLIF(level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: TermTypeOpts
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(term_type,''),'Unknown') AS ttype FROM dim_glossary_term ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: TermAdoptionTrend
dataAccesses.sql: WITH all_entities AS ( SELECT entity_key, MIN(scanned_date_key) AS first_key FROM fact_entity_snapshot WHERE scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY entity_key ), classified AS ( SELECT DISTINCT f.entity_key FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_type,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${ttype} ) SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, d.year_month_number AS ym, SUM(COUNT(ae.entity_key)) OVER (ORDER BY d.year_month_number) AS cum_entities, SUM(COUNT(cl.entity_key)) OVER (ORDER BY d.year_month_number) AS cum_classified FROM all_entities ae JOIN dim_date d ON ae.first_key=d.date_key LEFT JOIN classified cl ON ae.entity_key=cl.entity_key GROUP BY d.year_month_name, d.year_month_number ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: K
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM dim_entity WHERE entity_type='FILE') AS files, (SELECT count(*) FROM dim_entity WHERE entity_type='FOLDER') AS folders, (SELECT count(DISTINCT extension_name) FROM fact_extension_daily) AS extensions, (SELECT SUM(file_count) FROM fact_extension_daily WHERE snapshot_date_key=(SELECT max(snapshot_date_key) FROM fact_extension_daily)) AS scanned_files

dataAccesses.name: BE
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT extension_name AS ext, SUM(file_count) AS files FROM fact_extension_daily WHERE snapshot_date_key=(SELECT max(snapshot_date_key) FROM fact_extension_daily) GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(file_count)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: DFE
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type='FILE' AND lower(regexp_replace(e.entity_name,'^.*\.','')) = lower(${ext}) ORDER BY e.entity_name LIMIT 500

dataAccesses.name: BS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, count(*) AS files FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type='FILE' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: T
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT dd.year_month_name AS month, dd.year_month_number AS ym, SUM(f.file_count) AS files FROM fact_extension_daily f JOIN dim_date dd ON f.snapshot_date_key=dd.date_key WHERE f.snapshot_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 2

dataAccesses.name: KPIs
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT k.gb_moved, k.total_runs, k.success_pct, k.failed_runs, c.restricted_ungov, c.cross_boundary, c.sensitive_conns FROM ( SELECT ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb_moved, SUM(e.started_count) AS total_runs, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS failed_runs, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} ) k CROSS JOIN ( SELECT SUM(c.restricted_to_ungoverned_count) AS restricted_ungov, SUM(c.cross_boundary_count) AS cross_boundary, SUM(c.sensitive_connection_count) AS sensitive_conns FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND c.source_sensitivity LIKE ${sens} ) c

dataAccesses.name: Edges
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT c.orig_namespace AS source, c.dest_namespace AS target, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb, SUM(c.connection_count) AS connections, MAX(CASE c.source_sensitivity WHEN '1. Restricted' THEN 3 WHEN '2. Confidential' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) AS src_sens, MAX(CASE WHEN c.dest_governed_label='Ungoverned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dest_ungoverned FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND c.source_sensitivity LIKE ${sens} AND c.orig_namespace <> c.dest_namespace GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING SUM(c.bytes_moved) > 0 ORDER BY gb DESC

dataAccesses.name: Integrations
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT integration FROM dim_lineage_job WHERE integration NOT IN ('Unknown') ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: TopFlows
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration, c.orig_namespace || ' -> ' || c.dest_namespace AS flow, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb, SUM(c.connection_count) AS connections, MAX(c.source_sensitivity) AS sensitivity, MAX(c.dest_governed_label) AS dest_governance FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND c.source_sensitivity LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY gb DESC LIMIT 25

dataAccesses.name: Trend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM') AS month, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key <> 19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: DetailNodeFlows
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT c.orig_namespace AS source, c.dest_namespace AS dest, j.integration AS integration, c.source_sensitivity AS sensitivity, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb, SUM(c.connection_count) AS conns FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE c.orig_namespace<>c.dest_namespace AND c.bytes_moved>0 AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND c.source_sensitivity LIKE ${sens} AND (c.orig_namespace LIKE ${node} OR c.dest_namespace LIKE ${node}) GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 ORDER BY gb DESC

dataAccesses.name: K
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT f.application_key) AS apps, SUM(f.access_count) AS accesses, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS assets, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') THEN s2.bytes ELSE 0 END)/1e12::numeric,1) AS tb FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN fact_entity_snapshot s2 ON f.entity_key=s2.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: A
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT a.application_name AS app, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: T
