dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(a.application_type,''),'unknown') AS atype, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: S
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: R
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT a.application_name AS app, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS assets, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') THEN s2.bytes ELSE 0 END)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN fact_entity_snapshot s2 ON f.entity_key=s2.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: ASF
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT a.application_name AS app, COALESCE(NULLIF(d.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING SUM(f.access_count)>0 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 30

dataAccesses.name: DetailAppEntities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, f.access_count AS accesses, ROUND(f.accessed_size_tb*1000::numeric,2) AS accessed_gb, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE a.application_name LIKE ${app} AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY f.access_count DESC

dataAccesses.name: DS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: SENS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(s.entity_count) AS total_assets, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS governed_pct, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS completeness_pct, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') THEN s.bytes ELSE 0 END)/1e12::numeric,1) AS total_tb, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') THEN (s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0) ELSE 0 END)::numeric,0) AS monthly_cost FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'Unclassified') LIKE ${sensitivity}

dataAccesses.name: Pipeline
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct, SUM(started_count) AS runs FROM fact_lineage_event

dataAccesses.name: Lineage
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(restricted_to_ungoverned_count) AS restricted_ungov FROM fact_lineage_connection

dataAccesses.name: StorageBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb, count(*) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'Unclassified') LIKE ${sensitivity} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Governance
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(s.governance_coverage_status,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),''),'Unknown') AS status, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'Unclassified') LIKE ${sensitivity} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivity
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Freshness
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(s.scan_freshness_band,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),''),'Unknown') AS band, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'Unclassified') LIKE ${sensitivity} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: CompletenessBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: SourceScorecard
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, count(*) AS assets, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS gov_pct, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS comp_pct, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') THEN s.bytes ELSE 0 END)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(e.sensitivity,'Unclassified') LIKE ${sensitivity} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC NULLS LAST

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity WHERE sensitivity IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: HealthTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT dt.year_month_name AS month, dt.year_month_number AS ym, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS gov_pct, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS comp_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date dt ON s.scanned_date_key=dt.date_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE dt.date_key<>19000101 AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 2

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(restricted_to_ungoverned_count) FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') LIKE ${srcsens}) AS restricted_ungov, (SELECT SUM(sensitive_connection_count) FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') LIKE ${srcsens}) AS sensitive_conns, (SELECT SUM(cross_boundary_count) FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') LIKE ${srcsens}) AS cross_boundary, (SELECT SUM(s.entity_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.sensitivity ILIKE 'high' OR e.sensitivity ILIKE 'medium') AS sensitive_assets

dataAccesses.name: SensMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: DetailBySensitivity
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.governance_coverage_status,''),'—') AS governance, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY d.datasource_type, e.entity_name

dataAccesses.name: FlowMatrix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') AS src_sens, COALESCE(dest_governed_label,'Unknown') AS dest_gov, SUM(connection_count) AS conns FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE source_sensitivity IS NOT NULL AND event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') LIKE ${srcsens} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2

dataAccesses.name: RestrictedBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT orig_namespace AS src, SUM(restricted_to_ungoverned_count) AS flows FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') LIKE ${srcsens} GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(restricted_to_ungoverned_count) > 0 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15

dataAccesses.name: DetailRestrictedFlows
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (COALESCE(NULLIF(orig_name,''),'(unnamed)') || ' → ' || COALESCE(NULLIF(dest_name,''),'(unnamed)')) AS flow, regexp_replace(COALESCE(dest_sensitivity,'—'),'^[0-9]+\.\s*','') AS dest_sens, COALESCE(dest_governed_label,'—') AS governance, SUM(record_count) AS records, ROUND(SUM(bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE restricted_to_ungoverned_count > 0 AND orig_namespace LIKE ${src} GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY records DESC

dataAccesses.name: CrossTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(to_date(event_date_key::text,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM') AS month, SUM(cross_boundary_count) AS cross_boundary, SUM(sensitive_connection_count) AS sensitive FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE event_date_key <> 19000101 AND event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') LIKE ${srcsens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: BytesByDestSens
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(regexp_replace(dest_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') AS sens, ROUND(SUM(bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE dest_sensitivity IS NOT NULL AND event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') LIKE ${srcsens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SrcSensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All Sensitivities' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown'), COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown'), 1 FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE source_sensitivity IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ord, v

dataAccesses.name: SensToSensFlow
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') AS src_sens, COALESCE(regexp_replace(dest_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') AS dst_sens, SUM(connection_count) AS conns, ROUND(SUM(bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_connection WHERE source_sensitivity IS NOT NULL AND dest_sensitivity IS NOT NULL AND event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND COALESCE(regexp_replace(source_sensitivity,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),'Unknown') LIKE ${srcsens} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0))::numeric,0) AS monthly, ROUND(SUM((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0))*12::numeric,0) AS annual, ROUND((SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric)*10/1000::numeric,1) AS co2e_tonnes FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: CostBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0))::numeric,0) AS cost FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CostBySens
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, ROUND(SUM((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0))::numeric,0) AS cost FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Co2eBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND((SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric)*10/1000::numeric,2) AS tonnes FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CostTrend
dataAccesses.sql: WITH first_scan AS ( SELECT s.entity_key, MIN(d.year_month_number) AS ym, MIN(d.year_month_name) AS ymn FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1) SELECT fs.ymn AS month, ROUND(SUM((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0))::numeric,0) AS cost, ROUND(SUM(SUM((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0))) OVER (ORDER BY fs.ym)::numeric,0) AS cum_cost FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key JOIN first_scan fs ON s.entity_key=fs.entity_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY fs.ym, fs.ymn ORDER BY fs.ym

dataAccesses.name: DetailCosted
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0))::numeric,2) AS monthly_usd, ROUND(s.bytes/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb, ROUND(((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*10)::numeric,1) AS co2e_kg, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${src} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY (s.bytes*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0)) DESC

dataAccesses.name: CostGovScatter
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0))::numeric,0) AS monthly_cost, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS gov_pct, SUM(s.entity_count) AS entity_count FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CostBySrcTrend
dataAccesses.sql: WITH top_src AS ( SELECT d.datasource_type AS src FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY SUM((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0)) DESC LIMIT 8 ), first_scan AS ( SELECT s.entity_key, d.datasource_type AS src, MIN(f.year_month_number) AS ym, MIN(f.year_month_name) AS ymn FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key JOIN dim_date f ON s.scanned_date_key=f.date_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1, 2 ) SELECT fs.ym, fs.ymn AS month, fs.src, ROUND(SUM(SUM((s.bytes/1e12::numeric)*COALESCE(e.cost_per_tb_usd,0))) OVER (PARTITION BY fs.src ORDER BY fs.ym)::numeric,0) AS cum_cost FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key JOIN first_scan fs ON s.entity_key=fs.entity_key AND d.datasource_type=fs.src JOIN top_src ts ON fs.src=ts.src WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY fs.ym, fs.ymn, fs.src ORDER BY fs.ym, fs.src

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity WHERE entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS completeness_pct, SUM(s.missing_owner_count) AS missing_owner, SUM(s.missing_created_date_count)+SUM(s.missing_modified_date_count)+SUM(s.missing_accessed_date_count) AS missing_dates FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: Profiled
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.data_profile_status,''),'Not Profiled') AS status, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CompletenessBand
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(s.metadata_completeness_band,''),'Unknown') AS band, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: CompletenessBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: MissingAttrs
dataAccesses.sql: WITH s AS (SELECT fes.* FROM fact_entity_snapshot fes JOIN dim_datasource d ON fes.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON fes.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}) SELECT 'Owner' AS attr, SUM(missing_owner_count) AS cnt FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'Group', SUM(missing_group_count) FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'File Type', SUM(missing_filetype_count) FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'Path', SUM(missing_path_count) FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'Created Date', SUM(missing_created_date_count) FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'Modified Date', SUM(missing_modified_date_count) FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'Accessed Date', SUM(missing_accessed_date_count) FROM s ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: QualityScatter
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS comp_pct, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS gov_pct, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(s.entity_count)>0 ORDER BY 4 DESC

dataAccesses.name: WorstEntities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.entity_name AS entity, COALESCE(NULLIF(d.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count) AS expected, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS complete_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count) >= 5 ORDER BY complete_pct ASC, expected DESC LIMIT 15

dataAccesses.name: DetailByBand
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.metadata_completeness_band,''),'Unknown') AS band, s.metadata_completed_field_count AS completed, s.metadata_expected_field_count AS expected, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(s.metadata_completeness_band,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${band} AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY s.metadata_completed_field_count ASC, e.entity_name

dataAccesses.name: QualityRace
dataAccesses.sql: WITH top_src AS ( SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(s.entity_count) AS tot FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY d.datasource_type ORDER BY tot DESC LIMIT 8 ) SELECT dd.year_month_number AS ym, dd.year_month_name AS month, d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS completeness_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date dd ON s.scanned_date_key=dd.date_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN top_src ts ON d.datasource_type=ts.src WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY dd.year_month_number, dd.year_month_name, d.datasource_type ORDER BY dd.year_month_number, d.datasource_type

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: ScanCalendar
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(dt.full_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets, SUM(s.governed_entity_count) AS governed FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key JOIN dim_date dt ON s.scanned_date_key=dt.date_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} AND s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.entity_count) FILTER (WHERE s.scan_freshness_band ILIKE '%stale%')/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS stale_pct, ROUND(AVG(s.accessed_age_months)::numeric,1) AS avg_access_age, SUM(s.entity_count) FILTER (WHERE s.accessed_age_months >= 24) AS cold_assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: ScanFresh
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(s.scan_freshness_band,''),'Unknown') AS band, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: AccessedAge
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(s.accessed_age_band,''),'Unknown') AS band, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: ModifiedAge
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(s.modified_age_band,''),'Unknown') AS band, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Temperature
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT t.temperature_name AS temp, SUM(f.file_count) AS files FROM fact_temperature_daily f JOIN dim_temperature t ON f.temperature_key=t.temperature_key WHERE f.snapshot_date_key=(SELECT MAX(snapshot_date_key) FROM fact_temperature_daily) GROUP BY t.temperature_name, t.temperature_sort ORDER BY t.temperature_sort

dataAccesses.name: StaleBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.entity_count) FILTER (WHERE s.scan_freshness_band ILIKE '%stale%' OR s.scan_freshness_band ILIKE '%aging%')/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS stale_pct, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC NULLS LAST

dataAccesses.name: TempTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(to_date(f.snapshot_date_key::text,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM') AS month, SUM(f.file_count) FILTER (WHERE t.temperature_name ILIKE '%cold%' OR t.temperature_name ILIKE '%frozen%') AS cold, SUM(f.file_count) FILTER (WHERE t.temperature_name ILIKE '%hot%' OR t.temperature_name ILIKE '%warm%') AS hotwarm FROM fact_temperature_daily f JOIN dim_temperature t ON f.temperature_key=t.temperature_key WHERE f.snapshot_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: DetailByFreshBand
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.scan_freshness_band,''),'Unknown') AS scan_band, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.accessed_age_band,''),'—') AS access_age, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(s.scan_freshness_band,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${band} AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY e.entity_name

dataAccesses.name: FreshSourceMatrix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(s.scan_freshness_band,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),''),'Unknown') AS band, SUM(s.entity_count) AS n FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: K
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT f.glossary_term_key) AS terms, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS classified, count(DISTINCT g.level_1_glossary) AS glossaries, (SELECT SUM(s.entity_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e2 ON s.entity_key=e2.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e2.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}) AS total_assets FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: G
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: DGE
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(g.term_name,''),'—') AS term, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY 3, 1

dataAccesses.name: TT
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 15

dataAccesses.name: C
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 'Classified' AS label, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS assets FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} UNION ALL SELECT 'Unclassified', GREATEST( (SELECT SUM(s.entity_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e2 ON s.entity_key=e2.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e2.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}) - (SELECT count(DISTINCT f2.entity_key) FROM fact_entity_term f2 JOIN dim_entity e3 ON f2.entity_key=e3.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e3.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}), 0)

dataAccesses.name: SENS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: GL
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT level_1_glossary FROM dim_glossary_term WHERE NULLIF(level_1_glossary,'') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: DetailTermEntities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (f.entity_key) COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, g.level_1_glossary AS glossary, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) LIKE ${term} AND COALESCE(g.level_1_glossary,'') LIKE ${glossary} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY f.entity_key, name

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS governed_pct, SUM(s.governed_entity_count) AS governed, SUM(s.ungoverned_entity_count) AS ungoverned, (SELECT SUM(assignment_count) FROM fact_entity_policy) AS assignments FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: GovStatus
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(s.governance_coverage_status,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),''),'Unknown') AS status, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: GovBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS gov_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: UngovBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(s.ungoverned_entity_count) AS ungoverned FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TopPolicies
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT p.policy_name AS policy, SUM(f.assignment_count) AS assigns FROM fact_entity_policy f JOIN dim_policy p ON f.policy_key=p.policy_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15

dataAccesses.name: PolicyNetwork
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT p.policy_name AS policy, d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(f.assignment_count) AS assigns FROM fact_entity_policy f JOIN dim_policy p ON f.policy_key=p.policy_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING SUM(f.assignment_count) > 0 ORDER BY assigns DESC

dataAccesses.name: PolicyType
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(p.policy_type,''),'unknown') AS ptype, SUM(f.assignment_count) AS assigns FROM fact_entity_policy f JOIN dim_policy p ON f.policy_key=p.policy_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Trend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS governed_pct, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS complete_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key JOIN dim_datasource dd ON s.datasource_key=dd.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND dd.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY d.year_month_name, d.year_month_number ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: DetailUngoverned
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.governance_coverage_status,''),'Ungoverned') AS status, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE s.ungoverned_entity_count=1 AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${src} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') DESC, e.entity_name

dataAccesses.name: GovSensHeatmap
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT src, sens, gov_pct, total FROM ( SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),0) AS gov_pct, SUM(s.entity_count) AS total FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key GROUP BY 1, 2 ) t ORDER BY src, CASE WHEN sens ILIKE '%restrict%' OR sens ILIKE '%high%' THEN 1 WHEN sens ILIKE '%confiden%' OR sens ILIKE '%medium%' THEN 2 WHEN sens ILIKE '%internal%' OR sens ILIKE '%low%' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

dataAccesses.name: GovSensFlow
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT sens_tier, gov_state, cnt FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens_tier, 'Governed' AS gov_state, SUM(s.governed_entity_count) AS cnt FROM fact_entity_snapshot s LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1, 2 UNION ALL SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens_tier, 'Ungoverned' AS gov_state, SUM(s.ungoverned_entity_count) AS cnt FROM fact_entity_snapshot s LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1, 2 ) t WHERE cnt > 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN sens_tier ILIKE '%restrict%' OR sens_tier ILIKE '%high%' THEN 1 WHEN sens_tier ILIKE '%confiden%' OR sens_tier ILIKE '%medium%' THEN 2 WHEN sens_tier ILIKE '%internal%' OR sens_tier ILIKE '%low%' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, gov_state DESC

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: K
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets, SUM(s.missing_owner_count) AS missing_owner, ROUND(100.0*(SUM(s.entity_count)-SUM(s.missing_owner_count))/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS owned_pct, SUM(s.ungoverned_entity_count) AS ungoverned FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: O
dataAccesses.sql: WITH s AS (SELECT fes.* FROM fact_entity_snapshot fes JOIN dim_datasource d ON fes.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON fes.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}) SELECT 'Owned' AS label, GREATEST(SUM(entity_count)-SUM(missing_owner_count),0) AS assets FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'Unowned', SUM(missing_owner_count) FROM s

dataAccesses.name: TO
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.owner_name AS owner, count(*) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE e.owner_name IS NOT NULL AND e.owner_name<>'' AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: M
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(s.missing_owner_count) AS missing FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SC
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets, ROUND(100.0*(SUM(s.entity_count)-SUM(s.missing_owner_count))/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS owned_pct, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS gov_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: DetailUnowned
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.group_name,''),'—') AS group_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.governance_coverage_status,''),'—') AS governance, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE s.missing_owner_count=1 AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${src} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY e.entity_name

dataAccesses.name: OwnershipSensMatrix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT src, sensitivity, owned_pct, total FROM ( SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, ROUND(100.0*(SUM(s.entity_count)-SUM(s.missing_owner_count))/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS owned_pct, SUM(s.entity_count) AS total FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key GROUP BY 1, 2 ) t ORDER BY src, CASE WHEN sensitivity ILIKE '%restrict%' OR sensitivity ILIKE '%high%' THEN 1 WHEN sensitivity ILIKE '%confiden%' OR sensitivity ILIKE '%medium%' THEN 2 WHEN sensitivity ILIKE '%internal%' OR sensitivity ILIKE '%low%' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

dataAccesses.name: DS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: SENS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: OwnershipTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT dt.year_month_name AS month, dt.year_month_number AS ym, ROUND(100.0*(SUM(s.entity_count)-SUM(s.missing_owner_count))/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS owned_pct, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS gov_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date dt ON s.scanned_date_key=dt.date_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE dt.date_key<>19000101 AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 2

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(e.started_count) AS runs, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS failures, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, COUNT(DISTINCT j.job_name) AS jobs FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey}

dataAccesses.name: SuccessTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM') AS month, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND e.event_date_key <> 19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: ByIntegration
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration AS integ, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS failures, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND j.integration<>'Unknown' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 4 DESC

dataAccesses.name: FailuresByJob
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.job_name AS job, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS failures FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) > 0 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15

dataAccesses.name: JobTopology
dataAccesses.sql: WITH jf AS ( SELECT lineage_job_key, SUM(failed_count)+SUM(aborted_count) AS fails FROM fact_lineage_event GROUP BY 1 ), top AS ( SELECT c.lineage_job_key, SUM(c.bytes_moved) AS tb FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON j.lineage_job_key=c.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND c.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND c.event_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY tb DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 14 ) SELECT j.job_name AS job, regexp_replace(c.dest_namespace,'^([a-z0-9]+)://.*','\1') AS dest, SUM(c.bytes_moved) AS bytes, COUNT(*) AS conns, COALESCE(jf.fails,0) AS fails FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN top ON top.lineage_job_key=c.lineage_job_key JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON j.lineage_job_key=c.lineage_job_key LEFT JOIN jf ON jf.lineage_job_key=c.lineage_job_key WHERE c.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND c.event_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY j.job_name, dest, jf.fails ORDER BY bytes DESC

dataAccesses.name: Lifecycle
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT et.event_type_label AS type, SUM(e.event_count) AS events FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_event_type et ON e.event_type_key=et.event_type_key JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: RunVolume
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM') AS month, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND e.event_date_key <> 19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: RunCalendar
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day, SUM(e.event_count) AS events, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS fails FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key=d.date_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND e.event_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: FailureRateTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM') AS month, j.integration, ROUND(100.0*(SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count))/NULLIF(SUM(e.started_count),0),1) AS failure_rate FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key = j.lineage_job_key WHERE e.event_date_key <> 19000101 AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND j.integration <> 'Unknown' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

dataAccesses.name: Slowest
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT view_name AS job, ROUND(AVG(runtime_seconds)::numeric,1) AS avg_secs, SUM(run_count) AS runs, ROUND(100.0*SUM(success_count)/NULLIF(SUM(run_count),0),1) AS success_pct FROM fact_pipeline_run GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: DetailFailedRuns
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.run_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(et.event_type_label,''),'(event)') AS event, e.event_date_key AS day, j.integration AS integration, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.out_namespace,''),NULLIF(e.in_namespace,''),'—') AS namespace, e.record_count AS records FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key LEFT JOIN dim_lineage_event_type et ON e.event_type_key=et.event_type_key WHERE j.job_name LIKE ${job} AND (e.failed_count>0 OR e.aborted_count>0) AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} ORDER BY e.event_date_key DESC, e.run_id

dataAccesses.name: Integrations
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT integration FROM dim_lineage_job WHERE integration NOT IN ('Unknown') ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_duplicate) AS dup_assets, ROUND(SUM(dup_savings_bytes)/1e12::numeric,1) AS savings_tb, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd*dup_savings_bytes/NULLIF(size_bytes,0))::numeric,0) AS savings_cost, ROUND(100.0*count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_duplicate)/NULLIF(count(*),0),1) AS dup_pct FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: DupsBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_duplicate) AS dups FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SavingsBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(dup_savings_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(dup_savings_bytes)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SavingsBySens
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT sensitivity AS sens, ROUND(SUM(dup_savings_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND is_duplicate GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TopDups
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, st.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(st.dup_savings_bytes/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM entity_storage_demo st JOIN dim_entity e ON st.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE st.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} AND st.is_duplicate ORDER BY st.dup_savings_bytes DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: DetailDups
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, st.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(st.size_bytes/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb, ROUND(st.dup_savings_bytes/1e9::numeric,2) AS savings_gb, COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(st.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM entity_storage_demo st JOIN dim_entity e ON st.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE st.is_duplicate AND st.datasource_type LIKE ${src} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY st.dup_savings_bytes DESC

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM entity_storage_demo ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,1) AS total_tb, count(*) AS assets, ROUND(AVG(s.bytes)/1e9::numeric,2) AS avg_gb, ROUND(MAX(s.bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS max_gb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: BySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb, count(*) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: ByResType
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.resource_type,''),'(unknown)') AS rt, ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SizeDist
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT band, count(*) AS assets FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN s.bytes<1e9 THEN '1. <1 GB' WHEN s.bytes<1e10 THEN '2. 1-10 GB' WHEN s.bytes<1e11 THEN '3. 10-100 GB' WHEN s.bytes<1e12 THEN '4. 100GB-1TB' ELSE '5. 1 TB+' END AS band FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}) t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: TopAssets
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.resource_type,''),'(unknown)') AS rt, ROUND(s.bytes/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY s.bytes DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: Growth
dataAccesses.sql: WITH first_scan AS ( SELECT s.entity_key, MIN(d.year_month_number) AS ym, MIN(d.year_month_name) AS ymn FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1) SELECT fs.ymn AS month, ROUND(SUM(s.bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb, ROUND(SUM(SUM(s.bytes)) OVER (ORDER BY fs.ym)/1e12::numeric,2) AS cum_tb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key JOIN first_scan fs ON s.entity_key=fs.entity_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY fs.ym, fs.ymn ORDER BY fs.ym

dataAccesses.name: GrowthBySource
dataAccesses.sql: WITH top_src AS ( SELECT d.datasource_type AS src FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY SUM(s.bytes) DESC LIMIT 8 ), first_scan AS ( SELECT s.entity_key, d.datasource_type AS src, MIN(f.year_month_number) AS ym, MIN(f.year_month_name) AS ymn FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key JOIN dim_date f ON s.scanned_date_key=f.date_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1, 2 ) SELECT fs.ym, fs.ymn AS month, fs.src, ROUND(SUM(SUM(s.bytes)) OVER (PARTITION BY fs.src ORDER BY fs.ym)/1e12::numeric,2) AS cum_tb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key JOIN first_scan fs ON s.entity_key=fs.entity_key AND d.datasource_type=fs.src JOIN top_src ts ON fs.src=ts.src WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY fs.ym, fs.ymn, fs.src ORDER BY fs.ym, fs.src

dataAccesses.name: DetailAssets
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.resource_type,''),'(unknown)') AS restype, ROUND(s.bytes/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE e.entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${src} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY s.bytes DESC

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity WHERE entity_type IN ('FILE','TABLE') ORDER BY 1
